Instance class vCPU Memory (GiB) Network bandwidth (Gbps) Max EBS bandwidth (Mbps)
db.m5.large 2 8 Up to 10 4,750
db.m5.xlarge 4 16 Up to 10 4,750
db.m5.2xlarge 8 32 Up to 10 4,750
db.r5.large 2 16 Up to 10 4,750
db.r5.xlarge 4 32 Up to 10 4,750
db.t3.micro 2 1 Up to 5 2,048
db.t3.small 2 2 Up to 5 2,048
